title: Hyper parallel sales-parcel accuracy sprint safe
note: Run a larger single-continue safe sprint: 26 parallel report-only jobs for runner state, logs, task comparison, Git probes, result history, dataset inventory, field profile, source registry, evidence chain, geometry/parcel scoring, UI/export/manual review plans, endpoint probe, risk register, and next backlog. Non-destructive. Wait 90-120 minutes before writing devam et.
